text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1315.  
But if we treat this as a modern time zone conversion ignoring historical changes:  
Asia/Shanghai is UTC+8, Europe/London is UTC+1 (or UTC+0 in winter, but July is summer daylight saving in modern times, so UTC+1).  

Time difference: UTC+8 to UTC+1 is 7 hours behind.  
5 PM (17:00) Shanghai → 17:00 − 7 hours = 10:00 same day in London.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 10:00, July 8
